name: US Foods Holding Corp.
summary: US Foods Holding Corp. is a national foodservice distributor supplying approximately 250,000 customer locations including independent restaurants, chain restaurants, healthcare, hospitality, government, and education customers. The company provides fresh, frozen, and dry food products as well as non-food items sourced from thousands of suppliers. It operates over 70 distribution facilities, a fleet of over 6,500 trucks, and over 90 cash and carry locations, supported by its MOX ecommerce platform and Exclusive Brand portfolio.

products.name: Exclusive Brands
products.description: Proprietary branded product portfolio spanning grocery, produce, center-of-the-plate and other categories offering quality and innovation.

products.name: MOX
products.description: Industry-leading ecommerce platform enabling customers to manage orders and inventories and receive business support.

products.name: Scoop
products.description: Program introducing high-quality innovative products multiple times per year, developed through rigorous research, sourcing, and testing.

products.name: Pronto
products.description: Convenient and flexible delivery program providing expanded on-time delivery options beyond traditional broadline services.

partnerships.description: GPOs negotiate pricing, delivery and other terms on behalf of members; accounted for approximately 27% of net sales in fiscal year 2025.
